hero.title: Melanie Busse
hero.subTitle: Senior Fullstack Developer
hero.description: Over 19 years of experience in the design and development of complex software systems. Expert in Java backends and modern web frontends with Angular and TypeScript.

backend.title: Backend Core
backend.description: Over 19 years of experience in Java. Specialist in Spring Boot and Quarkus. Architecture of scalable enterprise systems and microservices. Development of modular, testable backend systems with NestJS.

frontend.title: Frontend Engineering
frontend.description: Modern SPAs with Angular and TypeScript. Focus on performance, state management, and intuitive UX.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure & Hosting
infrastructure.description: Setup and management of vServer environments (Strato). Deployment of web projects via Docker and Nginx.

aiAutomation.title: AI & Automation
aiAutomation.description: Integration of LLMs into software workflows. Development of AI-powered tools and process automation. Real-time communication and event-driven architectures.

data.title: Data
data.description: Design and optimization of relational and NoSQL databases. Focus on data integrity and performance tuning.

devops.title: DevOps
devops.description: Automation of deployment processes and container orchestration for scalable cloud infrastructures.

workflow.title: Workflow & Tools
workflow.description: Proficient use of modern development environments and agile methodologies. Expert knowledge in modeling and transforming complex data formats.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.description: Design of maintainable systems through Domain-Driven Design (DDD) and hexagonal architectures.

projects.headline: Featured Projects
projects.introText: A selection of my work in e-commerce, public administration, and industrial software development.

emobility.title: E-Mobility Management Software
emobility.description: Concept and redevelopment of a cloud microservices architecture for innovative charging infrastructures. Focus on scalable systems and automated quality assurance.

amm.title: Labor Market Monitor (AMM)
amm.description: Further development of an analytical instrument for regional labor market structures. Implementation of interactive charts and migration to modern libraries.

education.title: Information System for Education and Profession
education.description: Maintenance of central online platforms (ELAN, Entgeldatlas). Focus on accessible PDF generation and complex data processing.

casino.title: Online Casino Platform
casino.description: Development of highly available casino solutions. Setting up declarative CI/CD pipelines and implementing new marketing microservices.

about.headline: Turning coffee into code since 2005.
about.introText: From a diploma in Business Informatics at the University of Paderborn to developing enterprise solutions for the Federal Employment Agency: My passion belongs to stable backends and high-performance frontends.

bootcamp.title: Intensive Bootcamp Fullstack Development
bootcamp.description: Deepening modern web technologies: From architecture with Next.js (App & Pages Router) to cloud deployment and modern backend structures with Node.js.

teccon.title: Senior Fullstack Developer
teccon.description: Concept and redevelopment of a cloud microservices architecture for innovative charging infrastructures.

ba_amm.title: Fullstack Developer (Labor Market Monitor)
ba_amm.description: Further development of an analytical instrument for regional labor market structures. Implementation of interactive charts.

ba_education.title: Backend Developer (Information System Education & Profession)
ba_education.description: Maintenance of central online platforms (ELAN, Entgeldatlas). Focus on accessible PDF generation.

edict.title: Software Developer
edict.description: Development of highly available casino solutions and setting up declarative CI/CD pipelines.

hmmh.title: E-Commerce Software Engineer
hmmh.description: Multi-tenant e-commerce platform based on Hybris and maintenance of Intershop systems. Creation of proof-of-concepts for acquisition.

areva.title: Java Component Expert
areva.description: Requirements analysis, data modeling in UML, and implementation of applications in Java, Struts, and Python.

isweb.title: The Web Begins
isweb.description: Creation of dynamic websites with HTML/CSS and JavaScript. Extracting data from CMS and creating workflows.

paderborn.title: Pioneering Tech
paderborn.description: Research on XML documents for PDAs and cross-domain architectures in the SIRENA project.

university.details: Specializations: Software Engineering, Databases, Information Systems, and Business Administration.

milchwerke.details: Degree: Industrial Clerk (Industriekauffrau). Foundation for understanding core economic and business processes.

erich_gutenberg.details: Higher commercial school, specialization: Office Management.
